description_long: This is a young adult female pedestrian with a punk-inspired appearance, featuring a short-sleeved crop top, short shorts, and tall, rugged boots. She wears a fitted respirator mask covering her mouth and nose, and a compact backpack with visible straps and buckles on her back. Her arms and legs are adorned with tattoos, and she has a confident, slightly slouched stance with one hand resting on her hip. The figure's hair is styled in a short, swept-back fashion, and she is accessorized with fingerless gloves and a utility belt. The overall look suggests a streetwise, urban survivor or rebel, ready for action in a gritty city environment.
description: A punk-styled young woman with a respirator mask, tattoos, short crop top, shorts, tall boots, and a small backpack, standing confidently.
description_view_0: Front view showing the respirator mask, tattoos, crop top, shorts, utility belt, and confident stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the mask, backpack straps, and the tall boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backpack, hair swept back, and the back of the shorts and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm tattoos, glove, and the side profile of the boots and shorts.
attribute_clothing_type: urban crop top, short shorts, utility belt, fingerless gloves, and tall rugged boots
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip and a relaxed, confident stance
